variant_description: Simple three-activity (ID check -> scanner -> exit) SimPy implementation matching the Georgia Tech ISYE 6501 homework assignment. Constant-rate Poisson arrivals, exponential ID check, uniform scanner service. Small, pedagogical, self-contained. Serves Scenario 1 (Checkpoint Capacity Sizing) only.

Full-featured Simio model with time-varying passenger arrivals (15-minute discretization across a full day), multiple resource classes (TDCs, TSOs, X-ray, AIT, WTMD), shift schedules, secondary screening, and OptQuest optimization for staffing. Based on the Ruiz et al. Phoenix Sky Harbor paper. Serves all four scenarios.
